     The Numbers Business Report

The Constant Gardener (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,579,798Details
International Box Office $52,721,801
Worldwide Box Office $86,301,599
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,498,705
Total $20,498,705
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Assigned to a new post, reserved British diplomat Justin Quayle relocates to Kenya with his lovely young wife, Tessa, an activist for social justice. When Tessa is found murdered out in the wilderness, circumstances point to her friend, Dr. Arnold Bluhm, but it is soon clear that he’s not the killer. Grief-stricken and angry, Justin sets out to uncover the truth behind Tessa’s murder — and in the process, he unearths some disturbing revelations.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,673,803 (25.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,500,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,346 opening theaters/1,387 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $62,654,350

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 31st, 2005 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: November 17th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: January 10th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment, released as The Constant Gardner
MPA Rating: R for language, some violent images and sexual content/nudity.
Running Time: 129 minutes
Geographical setting: Africa
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Faked Suicide, Human Experimentation, Pharmaceuticals, Whistleblowers
Subgenre: Political Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Potboiler Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Assigned to a new post, reserved British diplomat Justin Quayle relocates to Kenya with his lovely young wife, Tessa, an activist for social justice. When Tessa is found murdered out in the wilderness, circumstances point to her friend, Dr. Arnold Bluhm, but it is soon clear that he’s not the killer. Grief-stricken and angry, Justin sets out to uncover the truth behind Tessa’s murder — and in the process, he unearths some disturbing revelations.
